ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the production line assigned to the job */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the job */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the job */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the job completion */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the part being produced */,
  "autoclave_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the autoclave used in the job */,
  "part_family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part family */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the job */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the job */,
  "prep_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the preparation process */,
  "prep_end" INTEGER /* End time of the preparation process */,
  "layup_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the layup process */,
  "layup_end" INTEGER /* End time of the layup process */,
  "auto_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the autoclave process */,
  "auto_end" INTEGER /* End time of the autoclave process */,
  "demould_start" INTEGER /* Start time of the demoulding process */,
  "demould_end" INTEGER /* End time of the demoulding process */,
  "tardiness" INTEGER /* Tardiness in days (0 if on time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_part_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_family_id") REFERENCES part_families ("part_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "production_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the production line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production line (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., composite, metal) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the material */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the material */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the material */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the material */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the material */,
  "handling_instructions" TEXT /* Special handling instructions for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms offered by the supplier */,
  "delivery_terms" TEXT /* Delivery terms offered by the supplier */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the supplier (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_families" (
  "part_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part family */,
  "part_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the part family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part family */,
  "standard_process" TEXT /* Standard process for the part family (e.g., prep, layup, autoclave) */,
  "drawing_reference" TEXT /* Drawing reference for the part family */,
  "design_requirements" TEXT /* Design requirements for the part family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., autoclave, demoulding station) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the equipment */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Operational hours of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, engineer, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view job) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., job, material, order) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., start, end, update) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
